why: 空周数据时必须稳定回退，不能返回空结构或报错。
expected_summary: This week was light, which is a good chance to build a steady study rhythm for next week.

why: 只有单日数据时也要稳定输出周报，不应依赖满 7 天输入。
expected_summary: You worked on 2 tasks this week and completed 1 of them, which means your effort is moving things forward.

why: 全完成场景要给出确定性正向总结，避免因 LLM 缺失而丢失指标。
expected_summary: You completed all 3 tasks this week, which shows steady follow-through from start to finish.

why: 全未完成场景也必须返回完整 insight 结构，供前端稳定展示。
expected_summary: You worked on 3 tasks this week and completed 0 of them, which means your effort is moving things forward.
